---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Sovereign Agentic OS
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**
A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you'd like to happen.

**Which layer / component does this touch?**
- [ ] L1 · Agent core (LangGraph / LiteLLM / Langfuse / OpenSearch)
- [ ] L2 · Context (OPA / Docling / Haystack / dbt / Cube / OpenMetadata / Dagster)
- [ ] L3 · Self-service (Iceberg/Polaris / DuckDB/Trino / Superset / Forgejo / Argo CD / MCP)
- [ ] L4 · Science (JupyterHub / MLflow / Featureform / KServe)
- [ ] OS UI / Admin Console
- [ ] Packaging / install / docs

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
Any alternative solutions or features.

**Additional context**
Anything else, mockups, or references.
